summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Extended Niche Pulse features: custom niche input with priority logic and Explore Trend buttons. All backend APIs and frontend integrations working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/trends with custom_keyword parameter - accepts any keyword string (min 3 chars)
POST /api/trends with niche parameter - backward compatibility maintained
Custom keyword priority logic - custom_keyword takes precedence over niche parameter
Custom keyword validation - rejects keywords under 3 characters
Custom niche input field (data-testid: custom-niche-input) - accepts text input
Custom input priority - when custom input is filled, dropdown selection is ignored
Fetch Trends button works with both custom keyword and dropdown selection
Channel Analysis - themes display with 'Explore Trend' buttons (data-testid: explore-theme-0, etc)
Explore Trend button click - switches to Niche Trends tab and fetches trends for that theme
Smooth scroll to results after fetching trends
Tab switching functionality between Niche Trends and Channel Analysis
Toast validation messages for short keywords
Button state management - disabled when no input provided
